IBS470_01.00.04_Variant_000002.ddt

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference IBS470_01.00.04_Variante_0200.ddt_20170718T150140.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 125000
Send ID 74F
Receive ID 757
Functional Addr E4
Functional Name IBS
